panels.title: Active Controllers
panels.description: Exactly 1 = healthy (one elected KRaft leader).

panels.title: Under-Replicated Partitions
panels.description: Must be 0.

panels.title: Offline Replicas
panels.description: Must be 0.

panels.title: At-Min-ISR Partitions
panels.description: Partitions one failure away from going under min-ISR.

panels.title: Total Consumer Lag
panels.description: Sum of lag across all consumer groups (kminion).

panels.title: Total Lag by Consumer Group
panels.description: Total records behind, per group. The headline SLA metric.

panels.title: Lag by Group / Topic
panels.description: Which topic a group is falling behind on.

panels.title: Consumer Groups
panels.description: Number of consumer groups kminion sees.

panels.title: Lag per Partition (per group/topic)
panels.description: Exact lag on every partition — where a rebalance or stuck consumer shows up.

panels.title: Active Members per Group
panels.description: 0 members with non-zero lag = nothing is consuming (stuck/down).

panels.title: Bytes In/sec by Topic
panels.description: Ingest per selected topic.

panels.title: Bytes Out/sec by Topic
panels.description: Egress per selected topic.

panels.title: Messages In/sec by Topic
panels.description: Records produced per selected topic.

panels.title: Produce / Fetch Request Rate (cluster)
panels.description: Client request rates by kind.

panels.title: Failed Produce / Fetch Rate
panels.description: Should be ~0. Sustained non-zero = client or broker trouble.

panels.title: Bytes Rejected/sec
panels.description: Messages rejected (e.g. too large). Should be 0.

panels.title: Log Size by Topic
panels.description: On-disk size of each selected topic (summed across partitions).

panels.title: Log End Offset (per partition)
panels.description: Newest offset per partition — the write frontier.

panels.title: Log Segments (per partition)
panels.description: Segment count per partition.

panels.title: In-Sync Replicas (per partition)
panels.description: ISR size per partition; should equal replication factor.

panels.title: Under-Replicated (per partition)
panels.description: 1 = that partition is under-replicated. Should stay flat 0.

panels.title: Replica (follower) Lag — max per partition
panels.description: How far followers trail the leader. This is REPLICA lag, not consumer-group lag.

panels.title: ISR Shrink / Expand Rate
panels.description: ISR churn. Frequent shrink/expand = flapping replicas / slow followers.

panels.title: Failed ISR Updates/sec
panels.description: Should be 0.

panels.title: Partition & Leader Count (per broker)
panels.description: Balance across brokers; a big imbalance means uneven load.

panels.title: Request Latency p99 by Type (ms)
panels.description: 99th-percentile end-to-end request time.

panels.title: Produce Latency Breakdown p99 (ms)
panels.description: Where produce time is spent — isolates queueing vs disk vs replication.

panels.title: Request Handler & Network Idle %
panels.description: 1.0 = fully idle. Sustained near 0 = saturation.

panels.title: Request Rate by Type (cluster)
panels.description: All request types by rate.

panels.title: Request / Response Queue Size
panels.description: Backlog depth; rising = broker can't keep up.

panels.title: Purgatory Size by Operation
panels.description: Delayed operations waiting (Produce=acks=all waits, Fetch=long-poll consumers).

panels.title: Socket Memory Pool (bytes)
panels.description: Socket server buffer memory.

panels.title: Expired / Aged Connections Killed
panels.description: Connections force-closed by the broker.

panels.title: Network Bytes In/Out per Broker
panels.description: Per-broker aggregate network throughput.

panels.title: Active Controller (which pod leads)
panels.description: The pod reporting 1 is the elected leader.

panels.title: Raft Log End Offset & High Watermark
panels.description: Metadata log progress; replicas should track closely.

panels.title: Raft Current Epoch & Unclean Elections
panels.description: Rising epoch = re-elections; unclean elections risk data loss.

panels.title: Raft Commit Latency (ms)
panels.description: Time to commit a metadata record to the quorum.

panels.title: Raft Records Rate (append/fetch)
panels.description: Metadata record throughput.

panels.title: Raft Voters & Observers
panels.description: Quorum membership.

panels.title: JVM Heap Used
panels.description: Heap in use per pod.

panels.title: JVM Non-Heap Used
panels.description: Metaspace / code cache etc.

panels.title: GC Time Rate (s/s)
panels.description: Seconds in GC per second. Sustained high = memory pressure.

panels.title: Process CPU (cores)
panels.description: CPU cores consumed per pod.

panels.title: JVM Threads
panels.description: Live thread count; deadlocked should always be 0.

panels.title: Open File Descriptors
panels.description: Kafka uses many FDs (segments + connections); watch against the limit.
